Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Reqquest For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Andrew P. Collier, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: ROBERTA GORDON

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ROBERTA GORDON'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment AS To Defendant Adam Gifford is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
